name: gogcli-mcp-docs
description: Extended Google Docs for Claude via gogcli — auth + full Docs and comments support

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration (keyring, credential files)

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_docs_info
tools.description: Get Google Doc metadata (title, ID, properties)

tools.name: gog_docs_cat
tools.description: Read a Google Doc as plain text

tools.name: gog_docs_create
tools.description: Create a new Google Doc

tools.name: gog_docs_write
tools.description: Write or append text content to a Google Doc

tools.name: gog_docs_find_replace
tools.description: Find and replace text in a Google Doc

tools.name: gog_docs_structure
tools.description: Show document structure with numbered paragraphs

tools.name: gog_docs_run
tools.description: Run any gog docs subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_docs_copy
tools.description: Copy a Google Doc to a new document with the given title.

tools.name: gog_docs_delete
tools.description: Delete content within a Google Doc by character index range.

tools.name: gog_docs_edit
tools.description: Edit a Google Doc by finding and replacing text (stream-edit style).

tools.name: gog_docs_export
tools.description: Export a Google Doc as PDF, plain text, HTML, DOCX, or other format.

tools.name: gog_docs_insert
tools.description: Insert text at a specific position in a Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_list_tabs
tools.description: List all tabs in a Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_add_tab
tools.description: Add a tab to a Google Doc (title, position, parent, emoji icon).

tools.name: gog_docs_rename_tab
tools.description: Rename a tab in a Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_delete_tab
tools.description: Delete a tab and its content from a Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_clear
tools.description: Clear all content from a Google Doc, leaving an empty document.

tools.name: gog_docs_sed
tools.description: Stream-edit a Google Doc with sed-like regex expressions (s/find/replace/ syntax).

tools.name: gog_docs_update
tools.description: Update a Google Doc — insert or replace text at a specific position.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_list
tools.description: List comments on a Google Doc. Returns open comments by default; set includeResolved=true to include resolved comments.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_get
tools.description: Get a single comment by ID, including its replies.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_add
tools.description: Add a comment to a Google Doc. Optionally attach quoted text that appears as the highlighted passage in the Google Docs UI.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_reply
tools.description: Reply to an existing comment on a Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a comment (mark as done). Optionally include a closing message.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_delete
tools.description: Delete a comment from a Google Doc. This action is permanent.

tools.name: gog_docs_append
tools.description: Append text to the end of a Google Doc (the right tool for iterative construction). markdown=true known limitations (upstream): 3+ tables/call reorders trailing punctuation (split calls); inline bold/italic/code in cells renders literally (format after); empty-header tables leak literal pipes (use non-empty header).

tools.name: gog_docs_read
tools.description: Read a Google Doc as plain text or as raw Docs API JSON

tools.name: gog_docs_format
tools.description: Apply text/paragraph formatting (bold, italic, font size, color, alignment, line spacing, named style / heading level) — supports match, matchAll, matchCase

tools.name: gog_docs_trash
tools.description: Move an entire Google Doc to Drive trash (convenience wrapper around gog drive delete)

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_reopen
tools.description: Reopen a previously resolved comment.

tools.name: gog_docs_comments_locate
tools.description: Resolve a comment's quoted anchor to its current Docs API index range, or report it as orphaned.

tools.name: gog_docs_find_range
tools.description: Map literal text to its Docs API UTF-16 index range(s) for index-based edits.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_column_width
tools.description: Set a fixed table column width in points, or reset columns to Docs-managed even distribution.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_row_insert
tools.description: Insert a table row, optionally populated from a JSON string array.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_row_delete
tools.description: Delete a table row by 1-based number.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_column_insert
tools.description: Insert a table column before a 1-based position or at the end.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_column_delete
tools.description: Delete a table column by 1-based number.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_merge
tools.description: Merge a rectangular cell range in a table.

tools.name: gog_docs_table_unmerge
tools.description: Unmerge (split) the merged region containing a cell.

tools.name: gog_docs_named_range_create
tools.description: Create a named range — a durable anchor over document text, by matched text or indices.

tools.name: gog_docs_named_range_list
tools.description: List named ranges, optionally filtered by name.

tools.name: gog_docs_named_range_delete
tools.description: Delete a named range anchor (the text is untouched).

tools.name: gog_docs_named_range_replace
tools.description: Replace the text inside a named range, keeping the anchor for future updates.

tools.name: gog_docs_tables_list
tools.description: Enumerate native tables (dimensions, position) — feeds the table selector on the table tools.

tools.name: gog_docs_images_list
tools.description: Enumerate inline/positioned images.

tools.name: gog_docs_headings_list
tools.description: Enumerate headings (outline view), optionally one level.

tools.name: gog_docs_paragraphs_list
tools.description: Enumerate paragraphs with text-run ranges, styles, and links.

tools.name: gog_docs_insert_page_break
tools.description: Insert a Google Docs page break at a given index or at end-of-doc — the only path for multi-page deliverables.

tools.name: gog_docs_page_layout
tools.description: Toggle page layout (pageless | pages) on an existing Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_insert_table
tools.description: Insert a native Google Docs table with given dimensions, optionally populated from a JSON 2D array.

tools.name: gog_docs_cell_update
tools.description: Replace or append the content of a single table cell, addressed by table/row/column.

tools.name: gog_docs_cell_style
tools.description: Apply background color and inline text styling to one or more table cells.

tools.name: gog_docs_insert_image
tools.description: Upload a local image and insert it into a Google Doc.

tools.name: gog_docs_insert_person
tools.description: Insert a native Google Docs person smart chip for an email address.

tools.name: gog_docs_insert_date_chip
tools.description: Insert a native Google Docs date smart chip.
